description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release Packaging that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have three jobs: linux, macos, and windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-20.04, macos-10.15, and ubuntu-20.04 respectively). For each job, clone the repository, install .NET 6.0, prepare the environment, package the application (as an AppImage, disk image, or installer), and upload the package to the release.
